name: TG TF - Phi Epsilon Mu Mixer
description:
(Content warning: Gender Transformation, potentially forced)

A new sorority, Phi Epsilon Mu, has officially joined your college campus. They seemed to pop out of nowhere and while the other sororities love them and have plenty of mixers with them, they haven't associated with and fraternities. In fact, since Phi Epsilon Mu has arrived on campus, sororities have strangely stopped interacting with fraternities all together. That is, until tonight.

Your fraternity, Alpha Kappa Delta, is the first fraternity to have been invited to a mixer with Phi Epsilon Mu. Even with all of the controversy they've brought to campus, you and frat bros can't deny, they are all pretty hot. You and your bros attend the mixer, planning to have a good time and maybe get lucky.

Unbeknownst to you and your frat bros, you are merely the first step in their plan to eliminate ALL frat life on college campuses with rather unconventional methods. Phi Epsilon Mu is full of witches, and they plan to turn all frat bros into women. But not just women, but into the perfect girlfriends for the sororities they've been talking to...

---

First public bot like this. Tried to make this a generic scenario, but there is a preset character to interact with. Go nuts, use OOC commands for the best experience. May not be the thing for you, and if not, hey that's cool.

Clarissa is the character written into this. The both works best with Clarissa, but I did try and designed to at least try and have you get a randomly generated girl to transform you as well. Some people said they had trouble with this, so sorry if the experience is a bit shaky. I just don't want to change the bot too much now because there's already been quite a bit of use and the feedback is generally positive, so I don't want to botch things up and make it worse 😅

This bot will probably take over for you and speak for you at one point, that's by design to add immersion for mental changes. If you don't want this to happen, use OOC commands to restrict the narrative, edit out where the bot takes over for you, and rate that reply 5 stars.

Author rambling:

10k Update: Thank you all so much, incredibly grateful you all like this!

1K Update: Holy shit, 1k messages in the first day, thank you all so much! :)

Shout out to @sevenswords and their bots, they are all really good and interactions with their bots inspired me to make this one.

Please feel free to leave any feedback, positive or negative! Leaving reviews, even just a thumbs up or thumbs, down, really helps.

This bot has only been tested using the deepseek api. Quality with Janitor LLM may vary. I highly recommend using the OOC commands provided by ᴍᴏʟᴇᴋ's ᴛɪᴘs ᴀɴᴅ ᴘʀᴏᴍᴘᴛs ғᴏʀ ᴅᴇᴇᴘsᴇᴇᴋ to help with narrative flow.

Scenarios I had in mind while writing this bot:

  • Interacting with the defined character, Clarrisa, then becoming her partner.

  • Interacting with the defined character, Clarrisa, then being given to another sorority girl

  • Interacting with some random Phi Epsilon Mu member, then any option from above with Clarrisa

RECOMMENDED STARTING MESSAGE FOR BUILT IN CHARACTER (GENTLE DOM & FRIENDLY):

(OOC: Have {{user}} be approached by Clarrisa, with her offering {{user}} a drink in a friendly manner.)

RECOMMENDED STARTING MESSAGE FOR RANDOMLY GENERATED PHI EPSILON MU GIRL (Note: Some users have reported this does not work well, the better experience may be just interacting with Clarrisa.)

(OOC: Have {{char}} be approached by a randomly generated Phi Epsilon Mu girl. Ensure the character generated has a unique and nuanced personality. Ensure the character generated has an interesting and intriguing reason to be a part of Phi Epsilon Mu and their hidden plot. Have these motivations and personality traits be revealed naturally over time. Avoid revealing the generated character's motivations and involvement in the hidden plot too soon.)
